settings.text:
Thank you for your interest in Oshadhi's wide range of high quality essential oils, hydrolates, base oils and body care products! When logged in here, you automatically see your discounted prices.

There are two ways to place an order:

1. You can select your product or category through the main menu above. It has the same structure as the usual Oshadhi web shop.

2. For more convenience, you can go through our new quick order list below, select your desired quantity and put the product into the basket. To make product search easier, you can select your desired product category in the menu on the left.

You can easily toggle back and forth between both sections. When your order is completed you go to the checkout as usual.
